kept.text:
RWA keep growing in numbers and actions.

𝘍𝘳𝘰𝘮 𝘚𝘰𝘮𝘯𝘪𝘢 𝘭𝘢𝘶𝘯𝘤𝘩𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘪𝘵𝘴 𝘴𝘵𝘢𝘣𝘭𝘦𝘤𝘰𝘪𝘯 𝘵𝘰 𝘚𝘵𝘦𝘭𝘭𝘢𝘳 𝘢𝘭𝘴𝘰 𝘥𝘰𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘴𝘢𝘮𝘦  𝘵𝘰 𝘚𝘦𝘤𝘶𝘳𝘪𝘵𝘪𝘻𝘦 𝘭𝘢𝘶𝘯𝘤𝘩𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘢 𝘵𝘳𝘢𝘥𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘱𝘭𝘢𝘵𝘧𝘰𝘳𝘮 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘴𝘵𝘰𝘤𝘬𝘴, 𝘙𝘞𝘈 𝘭𝘰𝘰𝘬𝘴 𝘨𝘰𝘰𝘥 𝘩𝘦𝘳𝘦

These are some new developments that happened in RWA the past few days: 👇
-------------------

➢ @Somnia_Network partners with @Frax to launch USDso stablecoin. USDso is backed 1:1 by tokenized U.S. It is over-collateralized at 102%, allowing users to mint with USDC.
-------------------

➢ @StellarOrg gets its first regulated, yield-bearing stablecoin with YLDS launch. YLDS is designed for regulated fintechs and neobanks.
-------------------

➢ @Securitize to launch solana-based trading for tokenized stocks. Partnership with @jumptrading and @JupiterExchange combines their tech to make this work.
-------------------

➢  @Figure partners with @credibly360 to tokenize SMB loans onchain. Credibly will bring SMB loans onto Figure's Democratized Prime platform for instant financing.
-------------------

➢ @StateStreet and @galaxyhq launch tokenized cash management fund onchain. The SWEEP fund allows institutional investors to earn yield on stablecoins with 24/7 access.
-------------------

➢ @Bullish acquires @Equiniti for $4.2B to merge tokenization with traditional transfer agent. The deal combines Bullish's tech with Equiniti's regulated transfer agent serving capital markets.
-------------------

➢ @FalconXGlobal and @sygnumofficial partner to launch tokenized credit product for institutions. Sygnum Bank will provide access to FalconX's onchain structured credit facility.
-------------------

➢ @SeedliCapital raises $20M from @Nimbus_Capital_ for tokenized RWA expansion. Funds will support regulatory compliance, growth initiatives.
-------------------

➢ @raincards joins @Mastercard as principal member. This will enable Rain to offer stablecoin-powered credit and prepaid cards across 210+ countries and regions through Mastercard's network.
-------------------

➢ @TetraDigitalGrp launches CADD, Canada's first CAD-backed stablecoin from a financial institution.
-------------------

➢ @solstrategies acquires cross-chain swap aggregator @HoudiniSwap for $18 Million. The deal includes $8.25M in cash, $5.75M in a promissory note, and $4M in STKE shares, with no SOL holdings being sold to fund the purchase.
-------------------

➢ @FireblocksHQ to power @WesternUnion's USD-Backed Stablecoin USDPT. They will manage treasury, issuance, custody, and payment flows across Western Union's global network.

Which did I miss? Lemme know in the comments 👇

profile_bio.description:
Research: DeFi | AI | RWAs | L2s

In Web3 Since 2017. Survived 3 cycles.

kept.text:
Securitize, Ondo, and xStocks turned a years-long thesis into a live market in a single week.

Here's what happened.

→ @Securitize partnered with Computershare, which manages 60% of the S&P 500, to tokenize those shares onchain.

→ Securitize received FINRA broker-dealer approval, becoming the first to custody tokenized securities and run tokenized IPOs.

→ @OndoFinance launched tokenized $STRC, Strategy preferred stock at 11.5% yield, across Ethereum, BNB, and Solana, and was selected for DTCC's Industry Working Group alongside BlackRock, Goldman, and NYSE Group.

→ @xStocksFi launched 50+ tokenized stocks and ETFs live on BNB. The tokenized equity market is now at $1B+ TVL, up from $20M 15 months ago.

→ The NYSE filed an SEC rule change to allow tokenized securities under DTC's 3-year pilot. The CLARITY Act final text dropped the same week.
The signal split is worth paying attention to.

Signal dropped 30% WoW while impressions grew 11%. High-follower mainstream and TradFi accounts were amplifying the narrative, expanding reach beyond the crypto bubble, but the crypto-native quality engager layer was thinner than usual. If the gap persists, it's a sign of narrative broadening. Typically bullish for the sector, but can also precede froth.
What the CT conversation actually looks like.

Tokenized equities and RWA drove 39% of quality-weighted signal. But the second-largest category at 30% was TradFi × DeFi narratives, crypto-native analysts and VCs writing longer-form takes in response to the news. 

@katie_haun's TradFi disruption essay was the highest-signal individual post of the week. @0xfishylosopher's "Tokenized Startups as the next Internet Capital Markets meta" was close behind.

Stablecoins and policy took 19% of signal: CLARITY Act, Meta's USDC payments integration, Korea's stablecoin payment rail, and the $310B stablecoin market framing.

3 years of "everything will be tokenized someday." One week of live products, regulatory approvals, and institutional deployments. The conversation hasn't fully caught up yet.

quoted_tweet.text:
Solana Accelerate moved fast today

Here’s what you missed 👇

• @StateStreet, with $50T in assets under custody, is launching SWEEP, its tokenized onchain liquidity fund, on Solana with @galaxyhq 

• @Securitize, @jumptrading and @JupiterExchange are launching regulated, fully onchain trading for tokenized equities on Solana

• @joinrepublic launched tokenized @animocabrands equity on Solana, bringing onchain access to a major Web3 gaming and digital assets company

• @Anchorage and J.P. Morgan Asset Management announced tokenized instruments for cashless stablecoin reserves on Solana

• @SoFi is bringing SoFiUSD to Solana for payments

• @KASTxyz launched USD cashback for stablecoin spending

• @altitude is launching its own card for businesses spending directly from stablecoin balances

• @MoonPay acquired @DFlow in a $100M all-stock deal and is now the official onramp for https://t.co/3a4SJiCTko, Solana Foundation’s new agentic commerce platform with @googlecloud

• @privy_io launched Digital Asset Accounts on Solana for developers building fintech, trading, and consumer apps

• @jito_sol introduced @jtx_trade, a new Solana trading experience built for active traders

• @jump_firedancer 1.0 is now rolling out

• @perena added @humafinance as a new USD* yield source

• @RaposaCoffeeCo became the official coffee partner of the Miami Heat and Miami Marlins

• Breakpoint London tickets are now live, with Early Bird pricing through May 31

Institutional liquidity, tokenized equities, payments, infra, trading, yield, consumer apps, and a little Miami flavor

Not bad for one day.
